channel.title: Posts on Alessio Greggi's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Alessio Greggi's Blog

item.title: Travel Memories - Part 2
item.description:
I’ve always been a great supporter of low-budget trips.

The main reason for this is not that I don’t like to spend money (this is just part of the reason 😅), but because low-budget trips are often synonymous with weird and inconvenient experiences.

These experiences, for travelers, are the best stories to tell friends once back from the trip. The story that I’m gonna tell today embodies the essence of what I just described. This is one of my favorite stories to tell about my trips.

item.title: Travel Memories - Part 1
item.description:
I still vividly remember my first real trip.

It was early March 2011. My friends and I booked a super cheap flight to London for a one-night trip (we’d be back the following afternoon). At the time, Ryanair was offering incredibly cheap flights from Italy, making it possible for broke students like us to jump at the chance. If I’m not mistaken, I paid just 19€ for a round trip to London. Since then, I’ve been lucky enough to take many trips and collect some stories along the way.
